summary: Build cache eviction caused a 38-minute global build outage. Customers saw cache-miss rates spike to 100% before the rollback completed.
Ingest backpressure caused 12% point loss in the EU region for 22 minutes after a downstream Kafka broker went unhealthy.
Collector v1.4.2 dropped distributed traces longer than 256 spans due to an off-by-one in the tail-sampler.
Scheduler v3 canary rolled back after a deadlock between tenant queues caused 14 minutes of queued job stalls.
EU region experienced a 9-minute write outage after a faulty WAL compaction job consumed all node memory.
Web UI flake caused intermittent 502 responses on the build details page for ~6% of paid customers over a 40-minute window.
